annotations.description: Surrogate identifier for the worker assignment.
Unique identifier for the assignment.
Business title of the worker assignment.

annotations.title: ActionCode LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for actions.
Action being performed for this assignment, such as, Hire, Add Pending Worker, Manager Change and so on. Valid values are defined in the actionsLOV.
Name of the action performed on the assignment.

annotations.title: ReasonCode LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for action reasons.
Reason for the action being performed on the record. Valid values are defined in the actionReasonsLOV.
Name of the reason for the action being performed on the assignment.
Start date of the date-effective changes to the record.
End date of the date-effective changes to the record.

Sequence number of the change on the effective start date. For the first change on the effective start date, set this value to 1. For incremental changes, leave this value blank to generate the next number in the sequence.
Set to Y if this is the last change on the effective start date. Otherwise, set to N.
Unique identifier for the business unit of the assignment.

annotations.title: BusinessUnitName LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for business units.
Name of the business unit for the worker assignment. Valid values are defined in the hcmBusinesUnitsLOV.
Type of the assignment such as employee or contingent worker.
Meaning of the assignment type.
Unique identifier for the assignment status type.

annotations.title: AssignmentStatusTypeCode LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for assignment status types.
Code for the assignment status type.
Assignment status type. Valid values are defined in the assignmentStatusTypesLov.
Application-defined value that identifies a person type, such as employee or contingent worker.
Unique identifier for the user person type.

annotations.title: UserPersonType LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for person types.
User-defined value that identifies the person type such as employee or contingent worker. Valid values are defined in the personTypesLOV.
Unique identifier for the proposed user person type.

annotations.title: ProposedUserPersonType LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for person types.
Code of the proposed user person type. Valid values are defined in the personTypesLOV.
Expected start date for applicants. This value is required for pending workers.
Date when the assignment is expected to end.
Indicates whether the current assignment is the primary assignment for the worker. Valid values are true or false.
Indicates whether the current assignment is primary for the work relationship. Valid values are true or false.
Unique identifier for the worker's position.

annotations.title: PositionCode LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for positions.
Code for the worker's position.
Name of the position.
Indicates whether attributes from the position can be overridden on the assignment when using position synchronization. Valid values are true or false.
Unique identifier for the worker's job.

annotations.title: JobCode LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for jobs.
Code for the worker's job. Valid values are defined in the jobsLov.
Name of the job.
Unique identifier for the worker's grade.

annotations.title: GradeCode LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for grades.
Code of the assignment grade. Valid values are defined in the gradesLov.
Name of the grade.
Unique identifier for the grade ladder used for benefits.

annotations.title: GradeLadderName LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for grade ladders.
Name of the grade ladder used for benefits. Valid values are defined in the gradeLaddersLov.
Indicates whether the assignment is eligible for grade-step progression. Valid values are true or false.
Unique identifier for the grade step of the assignment.
Grade step for this assignment.
Unique identifier for the worker's department.

annotations.title: DepartmentName LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for departments.
Name of the department for the worker assignment. Valid values are defined in the departmentsLov.
Unique identifier for the reporting establishment.

annotations.title: ReportingEstablishmentName LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for reporting establishments.
Name of the reporting establishment. Valid values are defined in the reportingEstablishmentsLOV.
Unique identifier for the worker's location.

annotations.title: LocationCode LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for locations.
Code for the worker's location.
Name of the assignment location.
Indicates whether the worker works at home for the assignment.
User-defined category for the assignment such as full-time, permanent, and so on. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning of the assignment category.
Category of the worker such as blue collar, civil servant, and so on. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning of the worker category.
Indicates whether the worker is regular or temporary. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning that indicates whether the worker is permanent or temporary.
Indicates whether the worker works full-time or part-time. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning that indicates whether the worker is full time or part time.
Indicates whether the worker is a manager.

Identifies whether the assignment is paid by the hour or by a salary. Either maintained at the assignment level or employment or placement terms but not both. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning that indicates whether the worker is hourly or salaried.
Normal working hours, such as 37.5. Specify with the Frequency attribute.
Frequency of normal working hours such as week or month. Specify with the NormalHours attribute. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning of the assignment frequency.
Normal start time for the working day.
Normal end time for the working day.
Basis for calculating seniority for the person. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning of the seniority basis.
Duration of the probation period. Specify with the ProbationPeriodUnit attribute.
Unit of measure for the probation period. Specify with the ProbationPeriod attribute. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning of the probation period unit.
End date of the probation period.
Notice period for the assignment. Specify with the NoticePeriodUOM attribute.
Unit of measure for the notice period. Specify with the NoticePeriod attribute. Valid values are defined in the commonLookupsLOV.
Meaning of the notice period unit of measure.
Unique identifier for the address used for taxation purposes. This can be different from the mailing address.
Determines whether expense checks are sent to the home or office address.
Meaning of the expense check address.
Age at which the worker is retiring.
Planned retirement date of the worker.
Indicates whether the worker is a labor union member.
Unique identifier of the worker union for the assignment.

annotations.title: UnionName LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for worker unions.
Name of the worker union for the assignment. Valid values are defined in the unionsLov.

annotations.title: BargainingUnitCode LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for bargaining units.
Code for the bargaining unit.
Meaning of the bargaining unit.
Surrogate identifier for the collective agreement.

annotations.title: CollectiveAgreementName LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for collective agreements.
Name for the collective agreement. Valid values are defined in the collectiveAgreementsLov.
Surrogate identifier for the contract.

annotations.title: ContractNumber LOV
annotations.description: The list of values for contracts.
Number of the contract.
Building information associated with the work location.
Floor information associated with the work location.
Office number associated with the work location.
Internal mail location.

Default expense account of the assignment. If the expense account is configured with multiple segments, then provide the concatenated value. Separate the values using the separator configured for the expense account.

People Group Key flexfield for the assignment. If people group is configured with multiple segments, provide the concatenated value, separating the values with the separator configured for the People Group Key flexfield.
Standard working hours such as 40.
Frequency of standard working hours such as week or month.
Adjusted Full Time Equivalent for the worker assignment.
Annual working duration for the worker assignment.
Description of the annual working duration units.
Annual working ratio for the worker assignment.
Standard frequency for the worker assignment.
Standard working hours for the worker assignment.
Standard annual working duration for the worker assignment.
User who created the assignment record.
Date and time when the assignment record was created.
User who last updated the assignment record.
Date and time when the assignment record was last updated.

cardinality.sourceAttributes: AssignmentId, EffectiveStartDate, EffectiveEndDate, EffectiveSequence, EffectiveLatestChange, CategoryCode
cardinality.destinationAttributes: AssignmentId, EffectiveStartDate, EffectiveEndDate, EffectiveSequence, EffectiveLatestChange, CategoryCode

annotations.description: The assignments resource is a child of the workRelationships resource. It provides all the worker assignments as of the specified date. By default, the current date is retained.
